trans-d_kk_41: No matter how busy you are, if you don't eat in Qatar, when is it better for you to meet on these days?
trans-d_kk_430: Do you want to go to the gym? You won't get fat if you exercise.
trans-d_kk_394: Do you have time today? I have a new place to show you around the school, will you come?
